name: mda
description: MAGI: Markdown for Agent Guidance & Instruction - A next-generation markdown extension designed specifically for AI systems. MAGI enhances standard markdown with structured metadata, embedded AI instructions, and explicit document relationships, creating a seamless bridge between human-readable content and LLM/agent processing. Perfect for RAG,KAG
summaryZh: MAGI: Markdown for Agent Guidance & Instruction - A next-generation markdown extension designed specifically for AI systems. MAGI enhances standard markdown with structured metadata, embedded AI instructions, and explicit document relationships, creating a seamless bridge between human-readable content and LLM/agent processing. Perfect for RAG,KAG 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
